page_content:
Prerequisite: BSCI160 and BSCI161; or BSCI106; or permission of CMNS- Entomology department.

BSCI338 Special Topics in Biology (1-4 Credits)

Lectures, seminars, mini-courses and other special instruction in various biological subjects.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

BSCI339 Selected Topics in Biology (1-4 Credits)

Lectures, seminars, and other selected instruction courses in various biological subject matter.
